changeSet.author: s.pongratz

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from COMMUNICATION where COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Contact';

changeSet.sql:
UPDATE COMMUNICATION SET COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Organisation' WHERE COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID IN ( SELECT CONTACT.CONTACTID FROM CONTACT WHERE CONTACT.PERSON_ID IS null ) AND COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Contact';
UPDATE COMMUNICATION SET COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Person' WHERE COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_ROWID IN ( SELECT CONTACT.CONTACTID FROM CONTACT WHERE CONTACT.PERSON_ID IS NOT null ) AND COMMUNICATION.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Contact';
